nasb.text: When the servants of David came to Abigail at Carmel, they spoke to her, saying, “David has sent us to you to take you as his wife.”

esv.text: When the servants of David came to Abigail at Carmel, they said to her, “David has sent us to you to take you to him as his wife.”

cnv.text: 大衛的僕人到了迦密去見亞比該，對她說：“大衛差派我們到你這裡來，要娶你作他的妻子。”

ccb.text: 他的使者就启程到迦密去向亚比该传达大卫的心意。
